data.cms_portfolio: [{"title":"Data Research Insight TCG POKEMON & ONE PIECE","description":"This research utilizes data collected through Mandala Analytics, a Social Listening platform that gathers conversations from major social media channels, including Facebook, Instagram, X (Twitter), TikTok, and YouTube. [{"company":"EverydayMarketing.co","duration":"March 2026 – Present","position":"Junior Marketing Content Creator & Data Insight Researcher","description":"Utilized Social Listening tools to analyze market trends and consumer insights, then translated findings into actionable articles published on EverydayMarketing.co. Focused on delivering practical business knowledge that other organizations can learn from and apply to real-world marketing strategies.","isCurrent":true,"link":"https://everydaymarketing.co","logo":"https://scontent.fbkk5-3.fna.fbcdn.net/v/t39.30808-6/627636534_1527632028728074_6522134774561834815_n.jpg?stp=dst-jpg_tt6&cstp=mx1200x1200&ctp=s1200x1200&_nc_cat=105&ccb=1-7&_nc_sid=6ee11a&_nc_eui2=AeFqSJeIdYpgWblVVZPpUjI0RhLeikv9AmJGEt6KS_0CYhGEt6S9OThYMYCRnHSGfiZWJMk0xw5MIoSruatEezNK&_nc_ohc=FbyluE8udp0Q7kNvwEcsnFs&_nc_oc=AdpkcvioOUE_6ZnumhE_v4i0xF1mqYe0hpOPUhgv3FglAPNjg5B1bIBUd5MmNHVIgrM&_nc_zt=23&_nc_ht=scontent.fbkk5-3.fna&_nc_gid=yX0XFQOFsckZn_5k1t7jAQ&_nc_ss=7b2a8&oh=00_Af_Gt8ptUKfHtRJV8nRhu5sF-jFi4bsZcK_pl9vi7c8rJg&oe=6A3AB993","works":[{"title":"TCG Card - Data Research Insight by Social Listening","date":"March 2026","description":"Conducted Social Listening research on the TCG (Trading Card Game) market — Pokemon and One Piece cards — over 6 months (Oct 2025 – Mar 2026).

• Social Media: YouTube (70.9%) had the highest mentions with 2,734 total mentions. TikTok led engagement at 64.9% with 1.2M total engagements.
• Word Cloud: Key topics included card value, trading, buying/selling, competitions, and collecting — showing TCG cards are valued as tradeable assets.
• Influencers: Notable figures engaged include Mac Kenu (Zoro in One Piece Netflix), Janesuda Parnto (Thai national footballer), and Rathad Jitmuangnon (Muay Thai world champion).

Published by การตลาดวันละตอน (EverydayMarketing.co).","link":"https://www.facebook.com/share/p/17yLR7gyPh/","image":"TCG CARD.jpg"},{"title":"Data Research Insight TCG POKEMON & ONE PIECE","date":"May 2026","description":"Data Research Insight TCG POKEMON & ONE PIECE เทรดดิ้งการ์ดเกมที่ไม่ได้เป็นเพียงการ์ดเกม By Social Listening 
.
ซึ่งข้อมูลทั้งหมด เอโดะได้รวบรวมมาจากเครื่องมือ Social Listening อย่าง Mandala Analytics ที่ดึงบทสนทนาจากหลายแพลตฟอร์มหลัก ไม่ว่าจะเป็น Facebook, Instagram, X (Twitter), TikTok และ YouTube เพื่อนำมาวิเคราะห์ต่อในเชิง Insight และในบทความนี้เราจะพามาดูตั้งแต่ขั้นตอนแรก ในการ Research เพื่อเป็นประโยชน์และความรู้ให้กับนักการตลาดมือใหม่ที่กำลังศึกษาเรื่อง Data และสามารถให้ผู้ประกอบการ และผู้อ่านผู้อ่านนำไปปรับใช้กับแบรนด์ได้ด้วยครับ","link":"https://everydaymarketing.co/social-listening/data-research-insight-tcg-pokemon-one-piece-trading-card-games-that-are-more-than-just-card-games-by-social-listening/","image":"data:image/jpeg;base64,"}],"id":"__hc_exp_1"},{"company":"Esarn.com","duration":"April 2025 – June 2025","position":"Employee Journey Design","description":"Collaborated with the team to design and develop an Employee Journey system for Premier Quality Starch Public Company Limited.","isCurrent":false,"link":"","logo":"https://at-once.info/images/company/6670/logo_29092022-12420309.png","works":[],"id":"__hc_exp_2"}]
